note: Wiki notes mention a funicular railway (built 2006) to the top of Castle Hill, but OSM has no explicit wheelchair tags for the castle itself. Castle is on a hill requiring either funicular or stairs; no step-free route confirmed.
Open-air market with level ground and wide pathways, though some vendor stalls may be crowded.
Step-free entry with ramp access; interior is accessible with level flooring.

OSM shows a cafe named "Tromostovje" with access=yes tag at the bridge location. Bridge is a pedestrian crossing over river; wiki notes describe it as a major public space with food/drink kiosks, suggesting accessible public infrastructure.
Street-level cultural venue with mostly flat terrain, though some buildings may have uneven surfaces.
Lift access available; modern facilities with accessible restrooms and level exhibition spaces.
Hilly terrain with some paved paths; wheelchair accessible main routes but steep sections exist.
Large park with paved main paths and gentle slopes; accessible for most mobility levels.
Flat, open plaza with level ground and wide pedestrian areas; fully accessible.
Modern building with full lift access, accessible restrooms, and level exhibition galleries.
